settings.account.label: Habitica Account
settings.account.description: Create or copy credentials from Habitica Settings > API.
settings.userId.label: User ID
settings.apiToken.label: API Token
settings.apiToken.description: Habitica x-api-key header. The token is saved in Noctalia plugin settings.
settings.basicUi.label: Basic UI
settings.basicUi.description: The default panel stays focused on today's dailies and open todos.
settings.refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval
settings.dailies.label: Dailies
settings.todos.label: Todos
settings.notificationBadge.label: Show notification badge
settings.notificationBadge.description: Badge shows pending due dailies plus open todos.
settings.advancedUi.label: Advanced UI
settings.advancedUi.description: Optional features are disabled by default to keep the panel minimal.
settings.showHabits.label: Show habits
settings.showHabits.description: Adds a Habits section with up/down scoring.
settings.habits.label: Habits
settings.checklist.label: Show checklist items
settings.checklist.description: Shows daily/todo checklists and lets you toggle checklist progress.
settings.tagFilter.label: Enable tag filtering
settings.tagFilter.description: Fetch tags and filter tasks by a selected tag ID.
settings.selectedTag.label: Selected Tag ID
settings.selectedTag.description: Paste a Habitica tag UUID. Leave empty to show all tasks.
settings.colors.label: Colors
settings.colorization.label: Enable colorization
settings.colorization.description: Apply theme colors to the bar icon and badge.
settings.iconColor.label: Icon Color
settings.badgeColor.label: Badge Color
settings.badgeTextColor.label: Badge Text Color
settings.ipc.title: IPC
settings.ipc.refresh: Refresh: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:habitica refresh
panel.credentialsDescription: Add your Habitica User ID and API Token in this plugin's settings.
toast.configure: Configure Habitica credentials in plugin settings
tooltip.configure:

error.configure: Configure your Habitica User ID and API Token in settings.
